title: CBDT's Income-Tax Rules 2026: Important Corrections Notified
content:
# CBDT's Income-Tax Rules 2026: Important Corrections Notified

Ek important update hai! The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Income-Tax Rules, 2026 mein corrections announce kiye hain.

*   **What's New:** CBDT ne Notification No. 64/2026 [G.S.R. 286(E)], dated April 19, 2026, issue kiya hai.
*   **Purpose:** Is notification ka aim hai recently notified Income-Tax Rules 2026 (jo March 20, 2026, ko aaye the) mein 76 errors ko rectify karna.
*   **Scope of Corrections:** Amendments Rules 165 se lekar Rule 243 tak hain, along with various annexures, notes, and verification formats.
*   **Key Adjustments:** Corrections mein contact number fields ko country codes ke saath reformat karna, structural numbering theek karna (recognition, office-bearer details, operations, assets, and liabilities se related parts mein), aur minor textual changes for definitional precision shamil hain. Kuch examples mein "section 242" ko "rule 242" se replace karna aur PAN ko sole identifier banana by removing Aadhaar references from several columns bhi includes hai.
*   **Impact:** Ye corrections taxpayers, accountants, aur regulatory authorities ke liye compliance aur interpretation ko smoother banayenge.

Ye update Chartered Accountants aur Company Secretaries ke liye kaafi crucial hai jo income tax compliance deal karte hain, as it clarifies and rectifies provisions within the new Income Tax Rules.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/latest-news/notifications)

*Published on: 21 April 2026*
